name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: The SHL Occupational Personality Questionnaire, the OPQ32, is one of the most widely used and respected measures of workplace behavioural style in the world. It provides a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: This OPQ (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) report is based on the Universal Competency framework. It graphically outlines how an individual's typical way of behaving is likely to impact on competencies.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: This OPQ (Occupational Personality Questionnaire) report provides a detailed analysis of an individual's leadership potential, based on SHL's leading edge Leadership Model, providing a competency based approach to leadership.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Smart Interview Live Coding is a real-time online coding interview, with a compiler interface. It enables one-to-one, panel and group interviews to comprehensively evaluate candidates' skills across various technical roles.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: The Linux Programming (General) test measures knowledge of programming in a Linux environment. Designed for experienced programmers, this test covers AutoConf/AutoMake, Makefiles, C Programming, C++, Debugging Programs, Linux Programming Concepts, Platform Independence, Revision Control, RPC/CORBA, and X Programming.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of networking devices, protocols, reference models, routing and implementation of networks.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: SHL Verify Interactive G+ (SVIG+) is a test of general cognitive ability that also generates accurate assessments of three specific abilities: Deductive Reasoning, Inductive Reasoning, and Numerical Reasoning. Appropriate for all job levels, most relevant for positions requiring cognitive ability across a range of specific skills.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (US) (New)
description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (AUS)
description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding, calibrated for the Australian accent.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (U.K.)
description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding, calibrated for the UK accent.

name: SVAR - Spoken English (Indian Accent) (New)
description: An automated spoken English test that measures fluency, pronunciation, active listening, vocabulary, grammar and spoken English understanding, calibrated for the Indian accent.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Simulation based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents. It also measures typing and documentation skills.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv-Retail & Contact Center
description: The Precise Fit Entry Level Customer Service Solution (Retail/Contact Center) is for entry-level positions in which employees interact with customers by providing information or carrying out customer requests related to an organization's products or services.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Designed for entry-level positions in a contact center environment. Measures a candidate's ability to verify the customer or account, take ownership of customer issues, interact with customers, respond to difficult callers, listen attentively, and navigate account information. Also measures typing and documentation skills.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses how the candidate comprehends numerical information in various formats.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to post journal entries, classify items into assets and liabilities, analyze financial statements and calculate financial ratios.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of statistical methods, exploratory analysis, basics of probability, standard distributions and statistical testing.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Graduate Scenarios is a unique test of Managerial Judgement - an individual's ability to decide on effective ways of handling real life situations. Specifically designed to assess judgement in graduates, a group who typically has limited work experience to draw on.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: The Global Skills Assessment (GSA) is an assessment used to measure 96 discrete skills/behaviors, aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework (UCF). Measures self-reported behaviors an individual currently engages in.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: This report is designed for individuals who have completed the Global Skills Assessment (GSA). With coverage across the Great 8 Domains, this measure of self-reported behaviors offers a complete overview of current skills, with tips on leveraging top skill strengths and developing growth skills.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: This OPQ report provides a graphical and narrative summary of an individual's natural style critical to sales success, based on the existing OPQ32r questionnaire (not a separate test). Can optionally use input from the SHL Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) to add sales motivators and drives.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: This report draws insights from the OPQ. It provides an accurate and objective measure of a salesperson's ability to sell well in a digital first environment, with individual scores and score narratives for behaviours in SHL's Sales Transformation behavioural model.

name: Sales Transformation Report 2.0 - Sales Manager
description: Combines insights from OPQ and a Sales Management questionnaire to measure a sales manager's capability to lead a sales team undergoing a sales transformation process, with an overall job-fit score.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: A short pre-screening tool for many key entry-level roles, standalone across sectors, designed to identify potential employees who will have good dependability and reliability, and who are less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Sector-specific bundled solution measuring behaviors that underlie safe performance in a manufacturing/industrial work setting, with norms calibrated to manufacturing and industrial workforces. Assesses safe workplace behavior, compliance with rules, domain expertise, and multitasking.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of first aid, emergency safety measures, cleanliness and personal hygiene.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Measures knowledge of compliance with the standards required by the Security and Electronic Signature Standards as they apply to HIPAA. Designed for healthcare professionals, covering nontechnical and technical aspects of HIPAA Standards for Security and Electronic Signatures.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of different medical terms and abbreviations related to the human body, diseases and diagnosis.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform certain operations in a simulated environment of Microsoft Word: illustrations and graphics, page layout, creating content, printing, formatting, proofreading, and reviewing/securing documents.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Excel to maintain, organize, analyze and present numeric data.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Word to record and save textual information.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform operations in a simulated environment of MS Excel: formulas and functions, creating and analyzing data, formatting, managing workbooks, presenting data visually, printing and views, sharing and securing workbooks.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform operations in a simulated environment of Microsoft Word: illustrations and graphics, page layout, creating content, printing, formatting, proofreading, and reviewing/securing documents.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, files and exception handling, and advanced Java concepts like generics, collections, threads, strings and concurrency.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, file handling, exception handling, threads, generic class and inner class.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of REST features, architecture, handling requests, producing responses, entity translation, working with return types, security, filters, and interceptors.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

name: Docker (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Docker container, data management, Docker performance and swarm.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the architecture, cluster and services of Kubernetes.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Python programming, databases, modules and library.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of programming in the JavaScript language and its application in front-end development.

name: ReactJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the technical knowledge of React APIs, render function, JSX, form validation and styling.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the basic components and modules of Angular 6 and concepts like data binding, dependency injection, CRUD with HTTP, typescript, routing and navigation.

name: C++ Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of programming in the C++ language and the ability to use the C++ standard library to write code.

name: C# Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of C# programming structure, functions, collections, enumeration, exception handling, OOPs constructs, inheritance, event handling and operator overloading.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Selenium IDE, Selenium RC, Selenium grid, web driver, test design considerations, user extensions, frameworks and object repository.

name: MongoDB (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of MongoDB like sharding, replication, indexing, security and storage. It also checks the knowledge of MongoDB queries and data models.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge on how to use machine learning to analyze data, extract information, draw conclusions and make statistically-driven decisions.

name: R Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of R programming and its application in statistics.

name: Tableau (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of how to use Tableau to prepare tables, create visualizations, perform calculations, apply filters and carry out forecasting.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: An online ability assessment for pre- and post-hire processes. Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Measures the ability to derive the numerical problem from a written problem, calculate the answer to numerical equations, and work with numerical data in a realistic workplace context.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning (2014)
description: Used for job candidates applying to jobs at all levels that require logical reasoning ability. Sample tasks include dealing with new concepts, answering 'why' and 'how', and resolving complex and ambiguous problems.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability - Next Generation
description: Measures the ability to read written passages and comprehend the text, interpret tone and author intent, identify main ideas, and predict author responses.

name: Reading Comprehension - English v1
description: Provides a general measure of English reading comprehension. Comprised of items containing a passage the candidate must read to answer questions being asked.

name: Reading Comprehension - Spanish v1
description: Provides a general measure of Spanish reading comprehension. Comprised of items containing a passage the candidate must read to answer questions being asked.

name: Written Spanish
description: Measures knowledge of Spanish grammar and Spanish reading comprehension skills, for individuals where Spanish is their second language. Covers Adjectives, Adverbs, Conjunctions, Nouns, Prepositions, Pronouns, Verbs, and Reading Comprehension.

name: SVAR - Spoken Spanish (Castilian) (New)
description: Test automatizado de español oral que mide la fluidez, la pronunciación, la escucha activa, el vocabulario, la gramática y la comprensión oral del español (Castilian accent).

name: SVAR - Spoken Spanish (North American) (New)
description: Test automatizado de español oral que mide la fluidez, la pronunciación, la escucha activa, el vocabulario, la gramática y la comprensión oral del español (North American accent).

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven software development, incremental and iterative development and processes involved in agile software development.

name: Agile Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of tools, techniques and processes involved in the Agile testing methodology.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Automata - Fix (New)
description: A simulated compiler integrated test to measure debugging skills in C, C++ and Java. Checks the ability to fix logical or syntactical errors and to reuse existing code.

name: Automata (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates candidate's programming ability. Offers a familiar IDE environment available in over 40 different programming languages and tests candidates using real-world coding problems.

name: Automata Data Science (New)
description: A simulated test that measures the ability to analyze and modify data using machine learning algorithms to obtain desirable results.

name: Java Frameworks (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of different Java frameworks - Struts, Hibernate and Spring.

name: PHP (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of OOPs & programming constructs, web & database handling and advanced PHP.

name: Linux Administration (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the Linux operating system and its application in system administration and network administration.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cloud computing concepts, cloud service models, virtualization and private clouds.

name: Cyber Risk (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of cyber risk management, system and application security, network security and security management.

name: Project Management (2013)
description: Measures knowledge of how to manage projects to ensure objectives are completed on time and within budget, based on PMI's PMBOK Fifth Edition methodology.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge and understanding of basic HR concepts like planning, training and development, performance appraisal, and compensation management.

name: Marketing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of marketing principles, market research, consumer behavior, brand management, sales management, channel management and advertisement management.

name: Financial and Banking Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of investment products, banking products, taxation and principles of Macroeconomics.

name: Data Entry (New)
description: Simulated data entry test that measures the ability to accurately transcribe data from pre-filled forms and the ability to verify pre-filled data.

name: Typing (New)
description: Typing based test that evaluates typing speed and accuracy.

name: Entry Level Cashier Solution
description: For entry-level retail positions in which employees receive payment in the form of cash, check, or credit cards for goods purchased. Sample tasks include handling payments, offering customer service, and issuing receipts and refunds.

name: Entry Level Sales Solution
description: For entry-level positions in which employees proactively sell products or services to customers and have compensation and/or performance based on sales revenue. Sample tasks include promoting products, persuading customers, and completing transactions.

name: Entry Level Technical Support Solution
description: For entry-level positions in which employees provide technical assistance to computer users in a contact center environment. Sample tasks include resolving computer problems for clients in person, via telephone, or electronically.

name: Management Scenarios
description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement - an individual's ability to decide on effective ways of handling real life situations. Consists of hypothetical scenarios followed by several possible responses candidates rate for effectiveness.

name: Executive Scenarios
description: A unique test of Managerial Judgement designed to assess judgement in Executives, a group who typically has significant work experience to draw on. Consists of hypothetical scenarios with responses candidates rate for effectiveness.

name: Multitasking Ability
description: A measure of one's ability to adeptly work on more than one task simultaneously, while maintaining efficiency and effectiveness when interrupted or switching between tasks. Face-valid split-screen simulation.

name: Verify - Working with Information
description: Measures a candidate's ability to process information. Candidates are given information in different table formats and asked to use the information provided to answer related questions.

name: Verify - Following Instructions
description: Measures a candidate's ability to follow detailed instructions and then select the correct course of action. Candidates are presented with a set of rules and need to choose the appropriate response for various situations.

name: Split Screen Typing Test - Form 1
description: Measures speed and accuracy in typing text presented on the computer screen. Calculates a score based on total keystrokes, time taken, and number of errors made when typing six passages.

name: Proofreading v1
description: Measures ability to read for errors involving spelling, punctuation, grammar and word choice, and the ability to correct those errors.

name: Search Engine Optimization (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge on the concepts of need of SEO, SEO planning, SEO strategies, SEO software, tools and exchanging links.

name: Digital Advertising (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the candidate's knowledge about use of AdWords and tools to analyze ad performance on digital media.

name: AI Skills
description: The AI Skills assessment measures the skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
description: Measures 18 dimensions of an individual's motivation, and provides a comprehensive understanding of situations which increase and reduce their motivation. Understanding what motivates staff helps managers unlock each individual's full potential.

name: Sales Transformation 1.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Draws insights from the OPQ. Provides an accurate and objective measure of a salesperson's ability to sell well in a digital first environment (version 1.0, superseded by 2.0).

name: Business Communication (adaptive)
description: Measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace: skills necessary to communicate effectively with coworkers at all levels and with external business contacts. Covers Electronic Communication, Employment Communication, Listening, Meetings, Nonverbal and Verbal Communication.

name: Time Management (U.S.)
description: Adaptive test that measures knowledge of how to use time wisely in the workplace: Action Plans, Controlling, Decision Making, Organizing, Planning, Scheduling, Time Usage, and Time Wasters.

name: Civil Engineering (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of structural engineering, transportation engineering, surveying, geotechnical engineering and water resources engineering.

name: Mechanical Engineering (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of fluid and machine mechanics, thermodynamics, IC engines and manufacturing science.

name: Electrical and Electronics Engineering (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the candidate's knowledge and understanding on fundamentals of electrical engineering, instrumentation and control system and electronics.

name: Microsoft Windows Server 2012 Administration
description: Measures knowledge of Windows Server Administration: Active Directory, Administrative Tasks, Computer Properties, Configuration and Management, Design and Installation, Local Security Policy, Networking, Security, and Server Management.

name: Microsoft SQL Server 2014 Programming
description: Measures knowledge of Microsoft SQL Server 2014 Programming for experienced database programmers: Beyond Relational, Control Flow, Data Types and NULL, Database Design, Developer Tools, Modifying Data, Running Queries, and Writing Queries.

name: SQL Server (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of basic SQL queries, creating and altering tables, filtering, grouping, aggregation in SQL and querying multiple tables.
